synopsis: Fate of the Jedi: Outcast is a novel by Aaron Allston released on March 24, 2009. It is the first novel in the Fate of the Jedi series and published as a hardcover and audiobook. The book features an excerpt of the subsequent novel Fate of the Jedi: Omen. The audiobook is narrated by Marc Thompson, who narrated the audiobook versions for the Star Wars: Legacy of the Force series. The paperback was released on April 27, 2010.
title: Outcast
